patch:
--- a/comparator.v
+++ b/comparator.v
@@ -1,13 +1,15 @@
 module magnitude_cmp (
   input [15:0] val_x,
   input [15:0] val_y,
+  input enable,
   output greater,
   output equal,
   output lesser
 );
   // comparator logic
 endmodule
 
 module cmp_wrapper (
   input [15:0] x_val,
   input [15:0] y_val,
   input en,
@@ -15,6 +17,7 @@
 );
   magnitude_cmp cmp_inst (
     .val_x(x_val),
     .val_y(y_val),
+    .enable(en),
     .greater(gt),
     .equal(eq),
     .lesser(lt)
   );
 endmodule
before_code:
module magnitude_cmp (
  input [15:0] val_x,
  input [15:0] val_y,
  input enable,
  output greater,
  output equal,
  output lesser
);
  // comparator logic
endmodule

module cmp_wrapper (
  input [15:0] x_val,
  input [15:0] y_val,
  input en,
  output gt, eq, lt
);
  magnitude_cmp cmp_inst (
    .val_x(x_val),
    .val_y(y_val),
    .greater(gt),
    .equal(eq),
    .lesser(lt)
  );
endmodule
after_code:
module magnitude_cmp (
  input [15:0] val_x,
  input [15:0] val_y,
  input enable,
  output greater,
  output equal,
  output lesser
);
  // comparator logic
endmodule

module cmp_wrapper (
  input [15:0] x_val,
  input [15:0] y_val,
  input en,
  output gt, eq, lt
);
  magnitude_cmp cmp_inst (
    .val_x(x_val),
    .val_y(y_val),
    .enable(en),
    .greater(gt),
    .equal(eq),
    .lesser(lt)
  );
endmodule
